questions: What are the rules of badminton?
Badminton singles ar doubles er difference ki?
answers: Badminton is a racquet sport played with a shuttlecock across a net. It's one of the fastest racquet sports — smashes can exceed 400 km/h! It can be played as singles or doubles.
Badminton khelte ekta racquet, shuttlecock (feather or plastic), net, ar court lagbe. Game ta 21 points e hoy ar rally point system e khela hoy.
Some of the greatest badminton players include Lin Dan, Lee Chong Wei, Viktor Axelsen, and Tai Tzu-ying. In Bangladesh and India, badminton is hugely popular at both casual and competitive levels.

Badminton rules are straightforward — serve below the waist, keep the shuttlecock in bounds, and score 21 points to win a game. Matches are best of 3 games. Good footwork and wrist control are key to winning.
